title: TBI multiplex proteomics data
author: Liqiang Huang
content: S-BIAD2973 TBI multiplex proteomics data 2026-02-23 	JR-300 staining rounds (R1-R2) 11 chanels per round (C1-C11) R1: C1 Alexa Fluor 350 – DAPI; C2 Alexa Fluor 405 – DAPI; C3 Alexa Fluor 430 – CC3; C4 Alexa Fluor 488 – NeuN; C5 Alexa Fluor 546 – MBP; C6 Alexa Fluor 594 – RECA1; C7 Alexa Fluor 647
